recommendations.title: Ben 10: Race Against Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Ben, Gwen, and Max must stop an extraterrestrial who plans to open a gateway that leads to an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Destroy All Aliens
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the original animated series Ben 10.  Ben becomes targeted by an evil Mechamorph Warrior, named "Retaliator," who mistakenly blames Ben for something he did not do and attempts to destroy all aliens.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Transformers Prime: Beast Hunters - Predacons Rising
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Autobots, Decepticons, Predaking and Predacons form an unlikely alliance to battle a resurrected Unicron.
recommendations.director: Vinton Heuck, Scooter Tidwell, Todd Waterman

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.title: Ben 10 vs. the Universe: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A blast from Ben's past returns to do double the damage on Team Tennyson and planet Earth itself, forcing Ben to go interstellar to save the day. Based on the 2016 reboot.

recommendations.title: Family Guy Presents: It's a Trap!
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: With the Griffins stuck again at home during a blackout, Peter tells the story of “Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi.”

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor

recommendations.title: Buzz Lightyear of Star Command: The Adventure Begins
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Buzz Lightyear must battle Emperor Zurg with the help of three hopefuls who insist on being his partners.
